response.justification: Bogdan is an exceptionally talented engineer with 20 years of experience and strong entrepreneurial credentials that exceed baseline requirements. However, this role prioritizes specialized AI expertise and strategic advisory capability. While his recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq is promising, he lacks the established AI track record, academic credentials, or demonstrated strategic advising experience that typically define a Principal Engineer focused on AI Strategy. He could potentially grow into this role but may lack the immediate specialized depth the position requires.
strengths: Exceptional technical breadth across web, mobile, desktop, embedded systems, and infrastructure with 20 years of experience significantly exceeding the 15-year minimum
Proven entrepreneurial success through GISCollective founding and multiple early-stage company experiences, demonstrating strategic thinking beyond individual contribution
Strong mentorship and technical leadership demonstrated through workshops, talks, and recognized open-source projects like Trial and Fluent-Asserts
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML despite role preferring advanced AI credentials, and no evidence of AI research or academic depth
Limited demonstrated AI products or platforms—current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq appears early-stage rather than establishing recognized expertise
No clear track record of strategic customer or partner advisory work at director level, which is central to the principal engineer responsibilities
